title: Calcutta HC Directs Borrower to RBI Ombudsman Over Undervalued Truck Auction
description:
Calcutta HC permitted the borrower to file a fresh RBI Ombudsman complaint in the prescribed format and directed its consideration within six weeks.
The post Calcutta HC Directs Borrower to RBI Ombudsman Over Undervalued Truck Auction appeared first on TaxGuru.
